title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: ASHLAND EMERGENCY WINTER SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, personal hygiene items, shelf stable food, pet food, bedding and linen, camping gear and tents, and monetary. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm Email (541) 631-2235 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 631-2235 Main phone Main phone (541) 631-2235 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Transit: Route 10 stop ID 100570 Cross streets: Ashland and Clay Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
